CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Continued To Oct-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARGARET O'LEARY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Plaintiff Priscilla Schmidt filed a notice of non-opposition.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to the second cause of action for negligence is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
